bugReports.description: During automated validation of "Custom Command - Execute command 1: login with qa.user@example.test and Password@123", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Observe behavior and compare with expected journey outcome.
bugReports.expectedResult: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.
bugReports.actualResult: Loop protection triggered: repeated navigation pattern on https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-login/.
bugReports.suggestedFix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.
bugReports.businessImpact: Major feature instability impacts trust and operational confidence.
bugReports.userImpact: A significant segment of users experiences functional blockers.
bugReports.revenueImpact: Revenue can be impacted through drop-off in high-value journeys.
